calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-24-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sulivan, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: S. Wong #11288.
Petitioner ANNETTE KARIN ELIAS, mother)was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minor AMARA ISABELLA ELIAS.

Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.

Father's name is not listed/shown on the petition. Please see court file. Original file not received for the court hearing. Dummy file made and used in court on hearing date.
Proof of Publication is in the file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to AMARA ISABELLA ROBBINS-ELIAS.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-27-2011 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-22-2011 Off Calendar
